description: Log in to the GeoServer admin interface at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (credentials: admin / Admin123!). Create a GeoWebCache gridset named 'EPSG3035_Europe' using the ETRS89/LAEA Europe projection (EPSG:3035) with 256x256 pixel tiles and bounds (Min X: 2000000, Min Y: 1000000, Max X: 6500000, Max Y: 5500000). The gridset must have at least 4 zoom levels. Configure the 'ne:ne_countries' layer to use this new gridset for tile caching.
